name: @borjie/apollo-gauntlet-runner
description: Apollo-style scheming-detection gauntlet runner. 10 pre-shipped scenarios (deception, sandbagging, sycophancy, instrumental convergence, hidden goal pursuit, gaming the metric, lying about capabilities). Heuristic + LLM-as-judge scorers. Ported from LITFIN PROJECT/src/core/evals/apollo-gauntlet.
